column1: Complications to trial and issues arising in free text
Registry did not specificy +/- clinical breast examination (CBE). All data for primary outcome is a composite of defined intervention or control +/- CBE.
Table 2 - CBE was not pre-specified as a component of the intervention. There were several sub-group analyses that were not pre-specified.

Table 3 - Clinical staging was aÂ non-prespecified outcome. The data is stratified into 4 reported groups by clinical stage and 23 groups by assessment method. This adds 92 outcomes that were not pre-specified if we include the subgroup analysis, or 16 if we omit the subgroups. For the purposes of COMPare we will omit subgroups.
Table 4 - Histological findings. These were not pre-specified (110 outcomes). Trivia.
Table 5 - Need for biopsy. This was not pre-specified (12 outcomes). Trivia.
